title: Trailercrafted
description: a Minecraft adventure modpack with the look of the trailers
body:
**Trailercrafted** A Minecraft Vanilla+ adventure modpack with the the look of the Trailers that aims to improve performance, visuals, and exploration.

**Key Mods:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Better Combat

Distant Horizons

Dungeons And Taverns

Key Resource packs:

Bare Bones

Fresh Animations

</details>

**World Generation:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Amplified Nether

Dungeons And Taverns

Dungeons and Taverns Desert Temple Replacement

Dungeons and Taverns Jungle Temple Replacement

Dungeons and Taverns Ocean Monument Replacement

Dungeons and Taverns Stronghold Overhaul

Dungeons and Taverns Swamp Hut Overhaul

Geophilic

Nullscape

Sparse Structures

Tectonic

</details>

**Resource Packs:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Bare Bones

Bare Bones - Low On Fire

Bare Bones Glass CTM fix

Bare Bones Mod Compat + Extra

Bare Bones Patches

Bare Bones Simple CTM

Bare Bones x Eating Animation

Bare Bones x Fresh Animations

Fresh Animations

Fresh Moves

</details>

**Sounds:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Ambient Sounds

Auditory Continued

Presence Footsteps

Sound Physics Remasterd

</details>

**Visuals:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

BSL Shaders

Continuity

Eating Animation

Explosive Enhancement

Falling Leaves

First-person Model

Make Bubbles Pop

Not Enough Animations

Particle Rain

Particular

Shulker Box Tooltip

Snow! Real Magic!

Visuality

Wakes

</details>

**Vanilla+:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Advancement Plaques

AppleSkin

Better Advancements

Better Mount HUD

Better Third Person

Better F3

Cherished Worlds

Clumps

Disable Custom Worlds Advice

Easy Anvils

Easy Elytra Takeoff

Easy Magic

Fast Minecart

HerdsPanic

Horse Buff

ImmersiveThunder

InvMove

Item Highlighter

Let Me Despawn

Mod Menu

Mouse Tweaks

RpgDifficulty

ScalableLux

Smooth Scrolling

Tiny Item Animations

Trade

Cycling

Vanilla Refresh

Villager Names

YDM's Weapon Master

Zoomify

</details>

**Performance:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)

Cull Leaves

Debugify

Entity Culling

ImmediatelyFast

Indium

Lithium

Memory Leak Fix

ModernFix

More Culling

Sodium

</details>

(There are also many suport mods)
